VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-auto-scroll-fix.name: Chat Auto Scroll Fix
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-auto-scroll-fix.hint: Keep the chat pinned to the newest message when appropriate.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-auto-scroll-fix.desc: Uses Foundry's ChatLog.scrollBottom after new messages if the chat was already at the bottom or the message was sent by you.
